name: seo-article-audit
description: Diagnose why an AIHR article lost organic traffic, decide whether SEO salvage is viable, then execute confirmed strategies as compact click-focused article changes. Reads the article, checks Outline history, pulls worldwide and US-only GSC data plus Ahrefs keyword facts, runs Chrome-based factual SERP observation, recommends strategy before optimization, and bundles seo-strategy-execution for recommendations, rewrite risk assessment, draft edits, and article-diff-md red/green diff views.

interface.longDescription: Reads an AIHR article, checks prior Outline analysis, pulls Google Search Console and Ahrefs facts, delegates factual SERP observation for primary and secondary keywords, reports a human-in-the-loop salvage strategy, and can turn confirmed strategies into compact article recommendations, rewrite risk assessments, and article-diff-md draft edit views.
defaultPrompt: Why did this AIHR article decline?
Run SEO analysis for this URL
Suggest article changes from this SEO audit
Draft SEO refresh edits for this article
Save this SEO refresh in Outline
